mapper.sql: member_id, provider, provider_id, nickname, profile_img_url, locale, difficulty, `point`, distance, visit_place_cnt, refresh_token, refresh_token_expired_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_active
mapper.select: SELECT FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (provider, provider_id, nickname, profile_img_url, locale, difficulty, `point`, distance, visit_place_cnt, created_at, updated_at, is_active) VALUES (#{provider}, #{providerId}, #{nickname}, #{profileImgUrl}, #{locale}, #{difficulty}, 0, 0, 0, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, locale = #{locale}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = TRUE
UPDATE member SET refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, refresh_token_expired_at = #{refreshTokenExpiredAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET is_active = TRUE, deleted_at = NULL, nickname = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET is_active = FALSE, deleted_at = NOW(), nickname = NULL, refresh_token = NULL, refresh_token_expired_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = TRUE
